name: Chili Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 Bell peppers, red, green; yellow cut into strips
2 tsp Fresh Hot Chili Pepper or 1 tsp Dried Hot Pepper Flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add bell pepper strips, sliced onions, cumin, oregano, and chili flakes. Mix well.
4. Cover and cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
5. Slice chicken into half-inch strips and sprinkle with lemon juice.
6. Add vegetables; stir occasionally. Cook, covered, over medium heat for another 10 minutes.
7. Stirring occasionally, add salt and pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
Serving Suggestion: Serve with "Hash Browns Potatoes".
